mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_data (user_id, heart_rate, systolic_pressure, diastolic_pressure, blood_sugar, temperature, weight, health_status, description, monitor_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{heartRate}, #{systolicPressure}, #{diastolicPressure}, #{bloodSugar}, #{temperature}, #{weight}, #{healthStatus}, #{description}, #{monitorTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_data SET heart_rate = #{heartRate}, systolic_pressure = #{systolicPressure}, diastolic_pressure = #{diastolicPressure}, blood_sugar = #{bloodSugar}, temperature = #{temperature}, weight = #{weight}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, description = #{description}, monitor_time = #{monitorTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (#{startTime} IS NULL OR monitor_time >= #{startTime}) AND (#{endTime} IS NULL OR monitor_time <= #{endTime})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_warning (health_data_id, user_id, warning_type, warning_level, warning_desc, is_processed, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{healthDataId}, #{userId}, #{warningType}, #{warningLevel}, #{warningDesc}, #{isProcessed}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE health_status = 'abnormal'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE health_status = 'abnormal' AND monitor_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE DATE(monitor_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_warning_threshold (indicator_type, min_value, max_value, is_active, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{indicatorType}, #{minValue}, #{maxValue}, #{isActive}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_warning_threshold SET indicator_type = #{indicatorType}, min_value = #{minValue}, max_value = #{maxValue}, is_active = #{isActive}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_warning_threshold WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY indicator_type
SELECT * FROM health_warning_threshold WHERE indicator_type = #{indicatorType} AND is_active = 1

SELECT h.id, h.user_id, h.heart_rate, h.systolic_pressure, h.diastolic_pressure, h.blood_sugar, h.temperature, h.weight, h.health_status, h.description, h.monitor_time, h.create_time, h.update_time, u.real_name as elderlyName FROM health_data h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE (#{name} IS NULL OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.health_status = #{status}) AND (#{startDate} IS NULL OR DATE(h.monitor_time) >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR DATE(h.monitor_time) <= #{endDate}) ORDER BY h.monitor_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE (#{name} IS NULL OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.health_status = #{status}) AND (#{startDate} IS NULL OR DATE(h.monitor_time) >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR DATE(h.monitor_time) <= #{endDate})
